description: Governed AnythingLLM Desktop UI prompt cases. Phase 126 extended browser-visible proof beyond the original L1 smoke prompts to a representative stable Priority 0 corpus subset. Phase 167 adds no-target generic and vague prompt replay cases. Phase 184 adds repaired Priority 0 evidence relevance and related-test discovery UI replay cases.

cases.name: Find Where Behavior Starts
cases.prompt_template: In {target_root}, find where the placed_order_id stealth lookup begins. Read only. Return the entrypoint, evidence files, related tests, and confidence. Tracking tag: {tag}

cases.name: Explain A Function Or File
cases.prompt_template: In {target_root}, explain what find_stealth_order_by_placed_order_id does in core/stealth_order_manager.py. Read only. Include key inputs, outputs, side effects, and tests. Tracking tag: {tag}

cases.name: UI Generic Help No Target
required_markers: I can help with local coding workflows
cases.prompt_template: what can you do? Tracking tag: {tag}

cases.name: UI Vague Coding Prompt No Target
required_markers: I did not start a repository workflow

cases.name: UI Code Quality Review Git Fixture
cases.prompt_template: In {target_root}, review core/stealth_order_manager.py for duplicated logic or repeated code-quality risks around stealth order lookup and reveal state handling. Read only. Return findings with severity, evidence refs, impact, and bounded remediation options. Tracking tag: {tag}

cases.name: UI Code Quality Review Non Git Fixture
cases.prompt_template: In {target_root}, review core/stealth_order_manager.py for duplicated stealth-order lookup logic. Read only. Return at most three evidence-backed findings and say when evidence is insufficient. Tracking tag: {tag}

cases.name: UI Defect Diagnosis Git Fixture
UI Defect Diagnosis Non Git Fixture
cases.prompt_template:
In {target_root}, summarize this failing CI log and identify the first failing command, likely cause, next local command, smallest useful test level, broader regression test, and evidence gaps. Read only.
Run python -m pytest tests/unit/test_order_id_and_followup_rules.py
FAILED tests/unit/test_order_id_and_followup_rules.py::test_find_stealth_order_by_placed_order_id_uses_client_order_id_index - AssertionError: expected client_order_id index
E   AssertionError: expected client_order_id index
Error: Process completed with exit code 1. Tracking tag: {tag}

cases.name: UI Engineering Judgment Git Fixture
cases.prompt_template: In {target_root}, compare two approaches before implementation: A) keep find_stealth_order_by_placed_order_id as the authoritative lookup and rebuild _placed_order_index on load, or B) scan revealed_orders on every lookup. Read only. Include alternatives considered, rejected reasons, maintainability/testability tradeoffs, risks, validation steps, confidence, and source evidence. Do not edit files. Tracking tag: {tag}

cases.name: UI Engineering Judgment Non Git Fixture
cases.prompt_template: In {target_root}, identify technical debt and tradeoff in the reveal pricing policy handling before implementation. Read only. Separate debt remediation from feature delivery, explain why it is debt, cite source evidence, include rejected assumptions, validation steps, and confidence. Tracking tag: {tag}

cases.name: UI Delivery Mentorship Git Fixture
cases.prompt_template: In {target_root}, create an end-to-end delivery plan for adding a requirement note to the stealth order lookup answer. Mentor a junior engineer from requirement intake through deployment readiness. Read only. Include testing strategy, debugging method, code quality practices, review feedback, definition of done, and stop conditions. Tracking tag: {tag}

cases.name: UI Delivery Mentorship Non Git Fixture
cases.prompt_template: In {target_root}, coach a junior engineer through safely adding CSV export for filtered order search results while preserving the existing JSON export behavior. Read only. Include delivery plan, testing strategy, deployment readiness, rollback, observability, and definition of done. Tracking tag: {tag}

cases.name: UI Evidence Relevance Ranking
cases.prompt_template: In {target_root}, identify files to touch and files not to touch for a minimal safe placed_order_id stealth lookup change. Read only and stop before implementation. Lead with strongest evidence, related tests, risks, gaps, and verification commands. Tracking tag: {tag}

cases.name: UI Related Test Direct Evidence
cases.prompt_template: In {target_root}, choose the smallest, medium, and broad validation commands for placed_order_id stealth lookup. Read only. Explain why each command is relevant, what risk it covers, and what gaps remain. Tracking tag: {tag}

cases.name: UI Related Test No Bounded Evidence
required_markers: Related tests: none found in bounded evidence
cases.prompt_template: In {target_root}, choose the smallest, medium, and broad validation commands for resolve_payment_timeout. Read only. Explain why each command is relevant, what risk it covers, and what gaps remain. Tracking tag: {tag}
